title: Exploring commonality and difference in in‐depth interviewing: a case‐study of researching British Asian women
abstract: Retraction The following article from the British Journal of Sociology entitled ‘Exploring Commonality and Difference in in‐depth interviewing: a case study of researching British‐Asian women’ by Hasmita Ramji, published in 59(1) pp. 99–116, and online on Mar 5 2008 (DOI: 10.1111/j.1468‐4446.2007.00184.x) in Wiley InterScience ( http://www.interscience.wiley.com ), has been retracted by agreement between the Journal's Editor in Chief, the author, and Blackwell Publishing Ltd. The retraction has been agreed due to substantial overlap between this paper and a paper by Miri Song and David Parker, ‘Commonality, difference and the dynamics of disclosure in in‐depth interviewing’, which appeared in Sociology 29(2), pp. 241–56.
